a4455661b2b6c5e31d564de07fc0e08aa2511158.source: When I'm not coding, you can usually find me at the gym, crocheting or doing other crafts, or exploring new coffee shops!

41dd9a3884284734a2dd55f09f8ebcb3305748a2.source: I like exploring AI, the theory behind machine learning, and the impact AI tools can have on the software industry. To pursue this interest, I am working on an AI-powered multimodial college math tutoring system as part of my research under
41dd9a3884284734a2dd55f09f8ebcb3305748a2.translated: 我喜欢探索人工智能、机器学习背后的理论，以及人工智能工具对软件行业的影响。为了追求这个兴趣，我正在开发一个基于人工智能的多模态大学数学辅导系统，作为我的研究的一部分

dac8bfbbc4fb108237e14eea879d37c6aec67cc7.source: in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering. Also, I recently took CSCE 421 (Machine Learning).
dac8bfbbc4fb108237e14eea879d37c6aec67cc7.translated: 在计算机科学与工程系。另外，我最近上了CSCE 421（机器学习）。

5238aa31e29a45f75eb3f4a2ebef2dbd11caa3ef.source: Inspired by my dad, I developed an interest in business early on. In high school, I pursued and graduated with an Associate degree in Business through dual credit. Currently, I am earning a minor under Mays Business School in

In middle school and high school, I would volunteer at the thrift store and help make sandwiches for the homeless. 22d41a547e205b65678de2a5c4e19c731f2fd0b9.translated: 我一直热衷于服务社区。初中和高中时，我曾在二手店做志愿者，帮忙为无家可归者做三明治。这种对服务的热爱延续到了大学，我加入了一个名为“新生领导力组织”（FLO）的组织

6d33b838bf19f23bd27e15b86c3a7ea051e75b82.source: Memorial Student Center Freshmen in Service and Hosting. Through MSC FISH, I participated in various service opportunities, such as picking up trash at a park and volunteering at the food bank.

dcc9131ca0adbe158446e4609842661600045955.source: Built in Dr. Xia's Dream Lab, AnnoMath is an AI powered multimodal college math tutoring system applying pedagogically grounded annotation types to handwritten student work. Co-coded and analyzed 30 Khan Academy videos with a PhD researcher to derive annotation framework. Implemented annotation rendering, covering 22% of all annotations identified from frequency analysis of 30 instructional videos. Built frontend logic to render AI generated outputs from the OpenAI API.
dcc9131ca0adbe158446e4609842661600045955.translated: AnnoMath 建于夏梦博士的梦想实验室，是一个由人工智能驱动的多模态大学数学辅导系统，将基于教学法的注释类型应用于学生手写作业。与一位博士研究员共同编写并分析了30个可汗学院视频，以构建注释框架。实现了注释渲染，覆盖了从30个教学视频频率分析中识别出的所有注释的22%。构建了前端逻辑，渲染来自OpenAI API的AI生成输出。

6e9e58dca82b6932122a60ef1ec59787859c3a1f.source: Built a multi-interface boba shop POS platform on an Agile Scrum team. Led deployment and authentification security, integrated a TTS API and weather based drink recommendations, and contributed to dynamic database driven menu rendering, drink customization, and checkout flows.
6e9e58dca82b6932122a60ef1ec59787859c3a1f.translated: 在敏捷框架Scrum团队上构建了一个多界面的Boba商店POS平台。主导部署和认证安全，集成了TTS API和基于天气的饮品推荐，并参与了动态数据库驱动的菜单渲染、饮品定制和结账流程。

f0458bb5613c416900b3285873a54ac16dd8b20a.source: Led a consulting team for a small skincare company. Built a frontend product recommendation quiz, designed to integrate with the client's existing Shopify storefront. Trained a Random Forest model generating email recommendations from mock sales data with 98% prediction accuracy. Also coordinated the team through a full design and rebranding process. Presented at Fall 2025 Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
f0458bb5613c416900b3285873a54ac16dd8b20a.translated: 曾领导一家小型护肤公司的咨询团队。构建了一个前端产品推荐测验，设计用来与客户现有的Shopify商店集成。训练了一个随机森林模型，从模拟销售数据中生成邮件推荐，预测准确率达98%。还协调团队完成了完整的设计和品牌重塑过程。该展会于2025年秋季Aggies Create创新博览会上呈现。

9ab22549eda9fe0017e488df6cf3545a84e682be.translated: 网站专员兼软件工程实习生

df848cf7d8f0ef9f7ad3d346c60cf62d71ca6774.source: Developed the TAO website with fellow SWE interns for 10,000+ viewers. Practiced Git workflows including pull requests and code reviews. Helped manage a Discord community of 5,000+ engineering students and supported freshmen by brainstorming ideas for events, such as review sessions.
df848cf7d8f0ef9f7ad3d346c60cf62d71ca6774.translated: 与其他软件工程师实习生共同开发了TAO网站，观众数量为10,000+。练习了包括拉取请求和代码审查在内的Git工作流程。协助管理一个由5000+名工程学生组成的Discord社区，并通过头脑风暴活动（如复习辅导）支持新生。

b11c11382d1c3982844c81801ccc0b509ccab639.source: Built an automated bingo board generator that creates randomized bingo boards for ice cream store employees based on time-of-day logic and shift type to keep engagement up during slow periods.
b11c11382d1c3982844c81801ccc0b509ccab639.translated: 开发了一个自动宾果棋盘生成器，根据一天中的时间逻辑和班次类型，为冰淇淋店员工生成随机宾果棋盘，以在冷清时段保持互动。

9d19f1ba8076bc684c329a8b184233d4d5451c1e.source: Built in Dr. Xia's Dream Lab, AnnoMath is an AI powered multimodal college math tutoring system applying pedagogically grounded annotation types to handwritten student work. Co-coded and analyzed 30 Khan Academy videos with a PhD researcher to derive annotation framework. Implemented annotation rendering, covering 22% of all annotations identified from frequency analysis of 30 instructional videos. Built frontend logic to render AI generated outputs from the OpenAI API.
9d19f1ba8076bc684c329a8b184233d4d5451c1e.translated: AnnoMath 建於夏夢博士的夢想實驗室，是一個由 AI 驅動的多模態大學數學輔導系統，將教學基礎的註解類型應用於學生手寫作業。與一位博士研究員共同編寫並分析了30支可汗學院的影片，以建立註解框架。實作註解渲染，涵蓋從30支教學影片頻率分析中識別出的22%標註。建立了前端邏輯來渲染 OpenAI API 產生的 AI 輸出。

133a414248df30159e9002a530624df2926df92e.source: Built a multi-interface boba shop POS platform on an Agile Scrum team. Led deployment and authentification security, integrated a TTS API and weather based drink recommendations, and contributed to dynamic database driven menu rendering, drink customization, and checkout flows.
133a414248df30159e9002a530624df2926df92e.translated: 在敏捷框架 Scrum 團隊上建立了一個多介面的 Boba 商店 POS 平台。主導部署與認證安全，整合 TTS API 與天氣飲料推薦，並協助動態資料庫驅動的菜單渲染、飲料自訂及結帳流程。

203768258787ab5f359d355841761d1d5a96fa1a.source: Led a consulting team for a small skincare company. Built a frontend product recommendation quiz, designed to integrate with the client's existing Shopify storefront. Trained a Random Forest model generating email recommendations from mock sales data with 98% prediction accuracy. Also coordinated the team through a full design and rebranding process. Presented at Fall 2025 Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
203768258787ab5f359d355841761d1d5a96fa1a.translated: 曾領導一家小型護膚公司的顧問團隊。建立了一個前端產品推薦測驗，設計用來整合客戶現有的 Shopify 商店。訓練了一個隨機森林模型，從模擬銷售資料產生電子郵件推薦，預測準確率達 98%。同時也協調團隊完成完整的設計與品牌重塑流程。於2025年秋季Aggies Create Innovation Expo發表。

407f769c9115e0897de279837ca6711a5f4a7c3a.source: Through Aggies Create, built Signify Hex, an internal data visualization tool connecting patients with medical providers for at home services. Created a geospatial hex overlay for provider reachability, implemented real time gRPC data fetching, and reduced unnecessary frontend refreshes with Redis-based change tracking. Regularly met with Signify Health leadership. Awarded 1st place among consulting projects at the Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
407f769c9115e0897de279837ca6711a5f4a7c3a.translated: 通过Aggies Create，我们开发了Signify Hex，一个内部数据可视化工具，将患者与医疗提供者连接起来，实现居家服务。创建了地理空间十六进制覆盖层以实现提供者可达性，实现了实时gRPC数据获取，并通过基于Redis的变更跟踪减少了不必要的前端刷新。定期与Signify Health领导层会面。在Aggies Create 的创新博览会上获得咨询项目第一名。

30258d0ddd891ce5c720add59ddfe688023adca3.source: Through Aggies Create, built Signify Hex, an internal data visualization tool connecting patients with medical providers for at home services. Created a geospatial hex overlay for provider reachability, implemented real time gRPC data fetching, and reduced unnecessary frontend refreshes with Redis-based change tracking. Regularly met with Signify Health leadership. Awarded 1st place among consulting projects at the Aggies Create Innovation Expo.
30258d0ddd891ce5c720add59ddfe688023adca3.translated: 透過 Aggies Create，我們建立了 Signify Hex，一個內部數據視覺化工具，連結病患與醫療提供者，提供居家服務。建立了地理空間十六進位覆蓋層以提升提供者可達性，實作即時 gRPC 資料擷取，並透過基於 Redis 的變更追蹤減少不必要的前端刷新。定期與Signify Health領導層會面。在 Aggies Create 的創新博覽會上獲得諮詢項目第一名。
